/- This lemma provides an explicit formula for the norm of a sum of products of constants and functions, when restricted to a set G. It is a more complex version of norm_sum_const_mul_re, dealing with sums of such products under the influence of constants. -/
lemma norm_sum_const_mul {c : ℕ → ℝ≥0} {f : ℕ → (α → ℝ≥0)} {G : Set α} (hf : ∀ n, f n ∈ L^{p,r} μ) (hG : MeasurableSet G) :
    ‖∑ n, c n • (f n).restrict G‖_{L^{p,r} μ} ≤ ∑ n, c n * ‖(f n).restrict G‖_{L^{p,r} μ} := by
